hero.headline:
Create at the
speed of thought.
hero.body: Vibed is the creative operating system for storytellers and editors. Edit, organize and refine your footage in conversation with an assistant that respects your taste. Every edit lands as a named, reversible action.
hero.caption: No credit card required. Bring your own clips.

problem.headline: You shouldn't spend your weekend editing.

pains.headline: Every minute of silence costs you two.
pains.body: A 10-minute video contains 3–4 minutes of silence, stumbles, and filler words — all cut manually, one by one.

pains.headline: One video. Four exports. Endless hours.
pains.body: The same video needs to be reformatted, re-encoded, and re-captioned for every platform — a process that can take as long as the original edit.
pains.bodyBold: as long as the original edit.

pains.headline: Pro tools are built for pros, not creators.
pains.body: Professional tools are powerful but designed for full-time editors, not creators who edit as part of a larger job.
pains.bodyBold: as part of a larger job.

problem.kicker: The result: you either publish content that isn't as good as it could be, or spend your weekend editing.
problem.kickerBoldFg: isn't as good as it could be

workflow.headline: AI that works with your creativity.

moments.title: Conversational Editing
moments.copy: Tell the AI what to do, and watch the timeline update.

moments.title: Your transcript is your timeline
moments.copy: Click a sentence, the playhead is already there.

moments.title: Type what you want to cut
moments.copy: Show 'cut from so anyway to let's move on' → the cut appears.

moments.title: Speaker-scoped commands
moments.copy: Cut all of Marc's stumbles — VIBED highlights segments and removes them.

beforeAfter.headline:
Your 3-hour edit.
Done in 20 minutes.
beforeAfter.subtitle: What changes when you edit with VIBED

rows.without: Cut filler words one by one

personas.headline:
Built for everyone
who creates with video.

list.description: Records and edits everything alone. Publishes 2–5 videos a week.
list.after: 20–40 minutes. AI handles cleanup; you focus only on content decisions.

list.description: Long-form interviews, multiple guests, 30–90 minute episodes.
list.before: Manual scrubbing, separate transcription, clip selection by ear
list.after: Filler and silence cleaned in minutes. Speaker-colored transcript makes multi-guest editing feel like working in a text document.

list.description: Agencies and studios delivering corporate video, events, brand campaigns.
list.before: Junior editors spend 50% of their time on cleanup before a senior editor sees the footage
list.after: AI cleanup runs unattended. Senior editor gets a pre-cleaned rough cut with FCPXML ready for Final Cut or DaVinci.

roi.body: At 2.5 hours saved per video and 3 videos per week, VIBED saves you 30 hours a month. The Creator plan costs less than one hour of your time.
roi.boldPart: VIBED saves you 30 hours a month.

exports.headline: Works with the suite you already finish in.
exports.body1: Vibed isn't the last app you'll ever open — it's the first. Hand off cleanly to professional editing tools the moment you're ready to polish.
exports.body2: The transcript edit happens in VIBED. The finishing happens where you've always finished.

pricing.headline: One tool. Three speeds.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when the product earns it.

free.tagline: Edit your first project. Feel what conversational editing is.

creator.tagline: Edit every week. Export to any tool you already use.
features: All AI commands — filler, captions, best moments
NLE export — Premiere, Final Cut, DaVinci, OTIO

pro.tagline: Edit without limits. Bring your team.

quotes.text: Finally, an AI editor that knows when to get out of the way. It lets me work at the speed of thought without messing up my timeline.
quotes.author: Alex

quotes.text: The fact that I can dump it straight into Resolve when the rough cut is done is a complete game-changer for my agency workflow.
quotes.author: Sarah

finalCta.headline:
The future of editing
is collaborative.
finalCta.caption: Start free. No credit card. Bring your own clips.
